/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Werror -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -O3 -mcpu=apple-m1 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nbody_tests.dir/tests/test_nbody.cpp.o -o nbody_tests  libnbody_core.a lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib lib/libgtest.a
